summary: Added capability explorer sub-branch to Explorer pathway in system prompt (line 90), strengthened listen-longer voice rules (rules 12-13, line 40), added graceful silence handler with sendFollowUp tool reference (Graceful Wrap section, line 218), updated playbook knowledge base with Capability Explorer Variant section (line 40 of explorer-pathway.md)
